_comment: Template: replace all <placeholder> values. Remove _comment before use.
_comment_scope: scope: must begin with x_, lowercase and underscores only, max 18 chars
_comment_scopeId: scopeId: leave empty string before first now-sdk install; filled automatically after
_comment_name: name: display name for the app (can contain spaces)
_comment_tsconfigPath: tsconfigPath: required only when using TypeScript in src/server/; remove if not needed
_comment_dependencies: dependencies: ServiceNow app dependencies (not npm packages); empty object is valid
name: My Application Display Name
